_source: OmniClass Table 13 — Spaces by Function (publicly-available mirror, see _source/OmniClass-Table-13-source-notes.md for URL + edition + access date)
_note: Master index pointing to per-parent_category files under room-types/. Codes transcribed from publicly-available OmniClass Table 13 secondary mirror (https://pdfcoffee.com/omniclass-13-2012-05-16-pdf-free.html, accessed 2026-06-05), not the canonical OCCS PDF. Secondary mirror coverage is ~250-300 entries (~40-50% of aspirational 600-entry target); entry_count_target fields below are aspirational. Per-entry _verification_status field records sourcing. Future Sprint Y back-fill from canonical OCCS PDF (CSI license) will extend coverage to ~600 entries and raise _verification_status to occs_verified.

_units.code_format: OmniClass 13-XX XX XX XX XX (5-segment 13-digit notation)

residential.description: Single-family / multi-family / dormitory / hotel-style residential spaces
